def negative_python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_profile_claim_without_profile_artifact():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_profile_claim_without_profile_artifact"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag optimization comments or docs without profile, benchmark, or trace evidence."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
